name: Team Yang
subject: Let’s talk about $1.5 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
When we set this goal, we knew it was ambitious, but we also knew if anyone could get it done -- the Yang Gang could.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx) **PROGRESS TO GOAL:
$668,847 to go ** [**Chip in now to help us hit our goal**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=7&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
Hey Yang Gang --

This is the most crucial fundraising deadline to date. On October 1st, everyone will know if we’ve met our goal of $1,500,000 or not.

**Can you please make a contribution now?** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=15&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=14&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=11&amount=25&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---

Let’s talk about **$1,500,000** though. It seems like a lot of money, right? For us too. When we set this goal, we knew it was ambitious, but we also knew if anyone could get it done -- the Yang Gang could.

We chose this number for three reasons:
1. It will show the naysayers and the skeptics that this campaign is viable and ready to win the nomination.
2. We need to be strong in Iowa and New Hampshire, and the only way to do that is to hire more organizers and open more offices. Our organizers are the ones on the ground talking to caucus goers and persuading folks to support Andrew.
3. We need to continue to grow Andrew’s national name recognition which means investing in digital and TV ads.

If you believe in Andrew and his vision for our country -- we need you to make an investment in this campaign. **Pitch in as much as you can now so we can hit our FEC deadline goal:**

_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=17&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=6&amount=25&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---

Thanks for everything you do,
Team Yang
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11231?t=5&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=800%2E377263%2ElU4dqx) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: What losing Cory's voice would mean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| _In a minute, I 'm going to share why I believe we need Cory to remain in this race. **[If you agree, chip in right now to help us hit our $1.7 million end-of-quarter goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190927_AD_20190927-fr-AD-corysvoice-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ As you've probably heard by now, our campaign set a goal to raise $1.7 million by the end of the quarter. In fact, hitting this goal will determine if Cory can continue in this race and build a campaign that can go the distance. So, team, I'm writing you today because we are being radically transparent about the stakes: if this campaign is not in a financial position to grow, and if we don't have the resources we need, then we may not be in this race much longer. **In a moment, I 'm going to explain what losing Cory in the race would mean but right now, I'm asking:** **[If you agree that Cory's voice should remain in this race, make a donation today to keep our campaign on track to raise $1.7 million before our deadline Monday night.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190927_AD_20190927-fr-AD-corysvoice-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As the only U.S. senator who goes home to a low-income, majority-minority community, Cory brings a very unique voice to the Democratic field. His life experience allows him to speak with uncommon moral clarity about the pain of Americans who feel left out and left behind. I sincerely believe that when people see Cory Booker, they see someone who can inspire -- a leader who is unafraid to take on the structural inequities in our society, whether it's systemic racism, generational poverty or a badly broken criminal justice system. To know Cory is to know his unwavering belief in the power of bringing people together to take on our biggest challenges. Cory frequently reminds us that our common pain can only be addressed by reigniting our sense of common purpose. You'll often hear him on the trail talking about concepts like "radical love" and "courageous empathy" \-- how we can forge a stronger understanding of our commonality despite our differences. These are messages we're not hearing from the other candidates in this race. **[If you believe that Cory's vision of love and unity for America deserves to be heard longer in this race, chip in whatever you can.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190927_AD_20190927-fr-AD-corysvoice-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** While his opponents are tearing each other down over policy details or labeling others as insufficiently progressive, Cory remains focused on the mission at hand: **uniting the people to defeat Donald Trump.** Cory knows that beating Donald Trump is the floor, not the ceiling. We'll have plenty of work to do to heal our country after years of Trump's hatred and division -- and we need a leader who's ready to acknowledge that. **This is the moral leadership we 'd be losing without Cory Booker in this race.** Cory's relentless optimism resonates with every person he speaks to. In these dark times, his uplifting candidacy has provided hope to so many who've become disillusioned with the current state of politics. **It would be a loss for not only our party but for our country if someone like him was shut out of this race because he couldn 't raise enough money to compete.** Cory can be around for the long haul -- and be in a position to win -- but only if we raise $1.7 million by September 30th at 11:59 p.m. **It 's up to us to make it happen.** **Here 's a link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190927_AD_20190927-fr-AD-corysvoice-actives_actives_l4&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This has been quite the journey so far. How much further we make it depends on the support of individuals like you. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 **[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190927_AD_20190927-fr-AD-corysvoice-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b90/5fca0d19/77813af8/291f3855/1561754793/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b90/5fca0d19/77813af8/291f3854/1561754793/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b90/5fca0d19/77813af8/291f3853/1561754793/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b90/5fca0d19/77813af8/291f3852/1561754793/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b90/5fca0d19/77813af8/291f3851/1561754793/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b90/5fca0d19/77813af8/291f3855/1561754793/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: News Alert via Team Beto
subject: BREAKING from NPR
disclaimer_text: paid for by the NRA
body:
[1]Beto for America

This news is just in from NPR:

[1]NPR

NRA Was 'Foreign Asset' To Russia Ahead of 2016, New Senate Report
Reveals September 27, 2019

A scathing Senate report details how the NRA served as a “foreign asset”
to Russian officials in the lead-up to 2016. An 18-month investigation
showed how top NRA officials were offered lucrative business deals on
trips to Russia paid for by the NRA. Those transactions are completely
illegal for a tax-exempt nonprofit.

Now Beto is joining leading Democrats in calling on the federal government
to revoke the NRA’s tax-exempt nonprofit status.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190927-nra-tax-exemption/?source=ema20190927-57812&t=1001&akid=57812%2E444211%2EKMkz6v ]Can you join us today? Sign on to our petition calling on the IRS to
revoke the NRA’s tax-exempt nonprofit status.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190927-nra-tax-exemption/?source=ema20190927-57812&t=1002&akid=57812%2E444211%2EKMkz6v ]Sign on

After you’re done signing on, please forward this email to your friends
and family. We need as many people to add their names as possible to call
out the NRA. If NRA officials are going to use their political clout for
personal gain, they simply cannot continue operating as a tax-exempt
nonprofit. It’s that simple.

- Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190927footer&t=1003&refcode2=57812_444211_KMkz6v&akid=57812%2E444211%2EKMkz6v

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=57812%2E444211%2EKMkz6v

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

subject: The President is asking about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:

---

Friend,

We just finished a very important meeting with President Trump about online fundraising.

---
| We went over our FEC End-of-Quarter numbers, and he specifically asked why your name was **MISSING** from the **Deadline Donor List.**

This deadline is SO IMPORTANT that we need EVERY AMERICAN to step up. There's only a few days left to contribute, and President Trump is counting on your help to CRUSH our goal.

Remember, this is the first time that our fundraising numbers will be **published** since July and we need to DEMOLISH the 2020 Democrats. This deadline is so CRITICAL that the President has activated a special _QUADRUPLE-MATCH on all donations_ made before 11:59 PM TONIGHT.

name: Paul Begala
subject: We cannot let up now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:

Did you see the news folks? Less than two weeks after Sri announced he out-raised incumbent Republican Pete Olson, Olson announced he was retiring! Not only that, but the Cook Political Report upgraded this race from "Lean Republican" to a "Toss Up". But this isn't in the bag for Sri. Nothing suggests we can take it easy. Nothing I'm seeing is telling me that we can let up if we want to close the 5-point gap from last cycle and win this race. [**So**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ckylVh3cO311Hv_UtTVtlA60-uOrLxSF4OCmVVmCPZY=/cf9OLJzZ1Is75mLVUfpwTFi5ZiaLGCaywcTogx_J-5w=?refcode=20190928eoq3)**[, I'm asking you to dig deep and make a grassroots donation to Sri's campaign before the End of Quarter deadline on Monday. Sri was able to close a 34-point gap to less than 5 points last cycle, but we cannot take anything for granted. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/ckylVh3cO311Hv_UtTVtlA60-uOrLxSF4OCmVVmCPZY=/cf9OLJzZ1Is75mLVUfpwTFi5ZiaLGCaywcTogx_J-5w=?refcode=20190928eoq3)** This is one of the most important races in the nation. Not just because we need to flip this seat, but because we need to send Sri to Congress so each and every person in the 22nd District will finally have a leader who will put their priorities first. Make no mistake about it, the nation is watching this race. I grew up in this district, so the idea of Sri serving the district in the seat once held by Tom Delay would be a dream come true. body:
We only have a few days left to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goals -- and as of right now, we're slightly behind where we need to be. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a05/45c30650/10a866f47/668c8fb9/3856288298/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We only have a few days left to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal -- and as of right now, we're slightly behind where we need to be. **[Can you chip in to help close the gap?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a05/45c30650/10a866f47/668c8fbb/3856288298/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUZGX0VPUV9HT0xfQ18yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1FF_EOQ_GOL_C_20190928_V1S2_P_T2")**

Meeting our goal before this deadline will make sure we're able to grow this movement, increase the number of states we're organizing in, and share the big ideas to get our country working for working people again.

**But even though the pressure is high, you won't see Elizabeth hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors behind closed doors.**

You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her.

**Instead, grassroots donors are the people who fund our campaign. And right now, our movement needs your help.

[Can you make a contribution of $3, or whatever you can, to help hit our goal? Every new contribution that comes in will help our campaign get back on track to hitting this week's important end-of-quarter fundraising goal of 25,000 new donors before Monday's deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a05/45c30650/10a866f47/668c8fbb/3856288298/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUZGX0VPUV9HT0xfQ18yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1FF_EOQ_GOL_C_20190928_V1S2_P_T2")**

>
Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of our plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful.

We're proposing big plan after big plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face.

To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas.

That's what we're focused on.

So instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, Elizabeth will continue to spend time at meet and greets and organizing events. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that will level the playing field for working people.

Elizabeth's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. But that's only possible because of the support from people like you.

**[So we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time? Help hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal so we can continue to grow this movement the right way.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a05/45c30650/10a866f47/668c8fbb/3856288298/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUZGX0VPUV9HT0xfQ18yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1FF_EOQ_GOL_C_20190928_V1S2_P_T2")**

body:

BUT here's another fact: **We 're the largest grassroots-funded organization dedicated to electing Democratic Scientists. We did it in 2018, and we can do it again, but not without YOU!**

314 Action

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:
**In just a few days, our campaign will be closing the books on our third quarter of fundraising for 2020. **

This quarter's numbers are exceptionally important, because Greg's potential opponents are watching to see how much we raise to decide if they want to challenge him in 2020.

**So far our numbers are looking strong, but we must not take anything for granted. Therefore:**

**[Will you chip in to support Greg's re-election campaign ahead of Monday's critical September deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/uzLGxvMQVDmS92CJxTfR80q6lz1993zfTKk-1bTH4fM=/cP1muVBIuWdadSvC9jhsNKbLyrTqkJDYkyh6zVN6_5w=?refcode=X_092619_EOQ_E&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

body:

Hi,

It's hard to contain our excitement, so we'll get straight to the point:

**We 're just a few donations short of 2,000 grassroots contributions!**

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: Join us at Trio's!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
Dear friend,

We are gathering friends and neighbors on Monday at Trio's to get our campaign off to a strong start. If you cannot be there, you can still help.

Everyone knows the worst part about campaigning is raising money. It's no fun for you, and it's no fun for me. That's why this time around, we're hoping to do things a little differently.

We're asking you to contribute early, but not often. For this campaign, we want to have a strong launch so that we can get and stay ahead. For this reason, I am humbly asking you to give what you can at this event or in the next few days--specifically before 11:00 p.m. central standard time on Monday, September 30. That is the end of the first reporting period for this campaign. If we do this right, we can focus this campaign on the issues affecting Arkansas families on a day-to-day basis -- not fundraising and deadlines.

I really hope you can join us on Monday at Trio's, where we'll be hanging out, eating great food, and talking about Arkansas's future. If you can't be there, you can [give online here](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1HbUCAz-9NDQ0uSTtAgRVDHxon0_DLliSRKuiET8Z8=/wIOp8Y6zRmj4DWnsgQoRBapRYHHICBKYsbK4A75hdhU=).

And once again, please join our effort by [signing up to get involved](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1HbUCAz-9NDQ0uSTtAgRVDHxon0_DLliSRKuiET8Z8=/q74Z52Oi32UC2nHq-GR2pT5zypvXr8ny3OQJT0i1yc0=) and following our campaign on [twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1HbUCAz-9NDQ0uSTtAgRVDHxon0_DLliSRKuiET8Z8=/2rc4yP5bxfYshxiAFwIAcKONT0F11Y3NogGonjT83sA=), [instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1HbUCAz-9NDQ0uSTtAgRVDHxon0_DLliSRKuiET8Z8=/CmtFXcipciacKeV0TXovHc92NZhtGRtO_im8Ziv3Bcc=), and [facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1HbUCAz-9NDQ0uSTtAgRVDHxon0_DLliSRKuiET8Z8=/nvtKAdfkYITN2kAbYM4B4a2-2DGK0PDzU7uh1xu67pI=).

Hope to see you soon, and thank you for everything.

Clarke

Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
---

Little Rock AR 72217 United States

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I gotta say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I'm writing to you today because my good friend Mark Warner is up for re-election in 2020.
|
---
| | Derek, I'm writing to you today because **my good friend Mark Warner is up for re-election in 2020**.

While he's focused on earning Virginians' support for his own campaign, he's also busy lending a hand to local candidates for the General Assembly.

But Mark has a big FEC fundraising deadline approaching so I told him I'd take a moment and ask his supporters if they could chip in ahead of the deadline.

**[Donate today to Mark's campaign for Senate >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0af/53d9897e/524cd4fa/1c8e1a3b/955498950/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkeoq?refcode=20190928nd__243__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

**He 's been campaigning hard in the run-up to Election Day** because we have a chance to secure a Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and the Virginia Senate. Turning the General Assembly blue will allow us to finally pass commonsense legislation that'll help every Virginian.

I gotta say though: **winning back the General Assembly is no sure thing**. We have a tough fight on our hands in 2019 -- _and in 2020_. Every penny we raise will help spread our positive Democratic message to more voters across the Commonwealth. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0af/53d9897e/524cd4fa/1c8e1a3a/955498950/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190928nd__243__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0af/53d9897e/524cd4fa/1c8e1a26/955498950/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190928nd__243__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0af/53d9897e/524cd4fa/1c8e1a25/955498950/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkeoq?refcode=20190928nd__243__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** One of Mark's opponents is saying the Virginia Senate seat is a _top three_ pickup for the GOP, and Donald Trump is sending operatives to our Commonwealth in an effort to both defeat Mark and turn Virginia red next year.

We need to both re-take the General Assembly _this year_ , and raise enough money so Mark can defend his seat _next year_.

That way, he can continue his good work in the Senate securing our elections from foreign attacks, protecting health care for folks with pre-existing conditions, and making sure working people can get ahead -- and stay ahead.

**[Will you join me in supporting Mark's campaign by pitching in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0af/53d9897e/524cd4fa/1c8e1a24/955498950/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkeoq?refcode=20190928nd__243__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

name: Dean Browning for Congress
subject: Stop The Trump Impeachment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I am upset that I even have to write to you regarding this matter. Nancy Pelosi and her cronies have NO RESPECT for democracy, our country, or its great citizens.
She is using her power to oust OUR PRESIDENT from office by making up complete LIES. If you want to see firsthand the extent the Democrats are willing to lie, please click here to read President Trump's transcript of the phone call ([https://www.cnn.com/2019/09/25/politics/donald-trump-ukraine-transcript-call/index.html](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019yPb6BuLrjLOt-imkU6uaWgwEdXvi9WxlVHFFZN5EByOOeSB1sntjDZYWvI8WsSZ8OiuQ2bDT5o3ZDDzgBUCSgxvtsalZ13CV2G3yMjZOTL7JV6-kPHjPRIEZtInHFCqxBDhK1oF0ZuNmcjScToKUexAw41HUYl2KxclAjLIbc_dZrFQ7JxlsHccaZzZCwTG-tNaNqZrQuYzA1Sjtxb-otZUGFcdtVKaaTQLQTfVRv-WRzl_WVqm8w==&c=y2pZe9ahddH8pj8n3y1aOdSUxTUoPLiFmY7UNIAaQ5MNiVcZPY8Ybg==&ch=7m6ypg8hVtkSrEB7OYzGCSWb_KHJGZ1wE_tIyioOWFq5JRNHTU9UCg==)) and then listen to Rep. Adam Schiff's recount of the transcript ([https://www.foxnews.com/media/schiff-parody](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019yPb6BuLrjLOt-imkU6uaWgwEdXvi9WxlVHFFZN5EByOOeSB1sntjDZYWvI8WsSZ4XoQi8mVXQy7q7_x-AlWGIVh7Vx3iinIuKxBE3NSqfUnoTaQPfw5E0vhtuycB2Bj8MFbK466bgyVKzbLTXdTHBuA_idy_v5GiM-2xB4eoTE=&c=y2pZe9ahddH8pj8n3y1aOdSUxTUoPLiFmY7UNIAaQ5MNiVcZPY8Ybg==&ch=7m6ypg8hVtkSrEB7OYzGCSWb_KHJGZ1wE_tIyioOWFq5JRNHTU9UCg==)).

name: Team WF
subject: BREAKING: Trump in Minnesota.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Did you see this, friend?? President Trump is coming to Minnesota _for the second time this year._ **Trump is obsessed with flipping Minnesota red and we know he 'll say and do _anything_ to try to divide us.** If there was ever a time to prove that our One Minnesota movement stands ready to reject the politics of fear and division, it is right now. [**We can 't afford to fall short of our goal on Monday. Please make a contribution of $5 (or more if you can) to help us finish strong before the end of the quarter.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?refcode=body&amount=25) **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?refcode=button&amount=25)** Thank you, Team Walz-Flanagan \-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Peggy Flanagan **[BREAKING: Trump to campaign in Minnesota in October](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?refcode=body&amount=25)** My friend, I would think that President Trump has more pressing matters on his plate than his campaign right now, but he just announced he'll be coming to Minnesota on October 10th for a rally. This will be the second time he's traveled to Minnesota this year and his goal is simple: To flip us red for the first time in 48 years and drag the entire DFL ticket down when he does. **He 's made clear that he thinks he can do it by spreading fear and division. I guess he forgot that in 2018, our state rejected the politics of division and instead voted in record numbers for our One Minnesota agenda that recognizes our strength in unity.** Help us send him a clear message that we're ready to reject him up and down the ballot again in 2020. If we are going to stay on track to build the resources we need to accomplish this, we absolutely need to hit our $30,000 end-of-quarter grassroots goal before our deadline on September 30th. **We 're just about halfway there, and we need your help to make it up. We can't afford to lose steam right now. [Please make a contribution that works for you to help us make up the difference.](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?refcode=body&amount=25)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ****[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-d)**** ****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?refcode=_other-d)**** Thank you, Peggy Flanagan | | ********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3BHqdxEJbvhWyxflcIhwiYsjbrlhSkllMUMfxQ_QeI=/HUdwPE2Mt3-xO6nd0pgmYZalCKKraSUr1vk_yABCRLA=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)********

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Overcoming the national media establishment again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
I enjoy challenges: beating Senator Arlen Specter starting 40 points down, and Congressman Curt Weldon starting 30 points down.
**The challenge I am overcoming today is the three national cable news networks, exemplified by one network's internal email to its producers** the day after I announced:
“As per the guidance of our Political Unit, XXX is**NOT currently counting Joe Sestak (former Navy admiral and former U.S. House Member from Pennsylvania)** on our list of major 2020 candidates” ... **canceling a planned interview, as the other networks joined in by declining repeated requests for interviews** on war and peace.

| | I asked.
Speaker Pelosi asked.

Pramila Jayapal asked.

I know it's Saturday morning, but this simply can't wait.

[**_If I don't fill my critical budget gap before my end-of-quarter deadline in 48 hours, I will fall short of my fundraising goal for the first time in this entire election. Can I count on your immediate $5? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I just learned I have a $4,359 budget gap to fill in less than 48 hours.

**I simply can't afford to fall short of my critical fundraising goal just days after President Trump held a big rally here in New Mexico.**

It would set the tone for this entire election. It would tell Trump that every swing state is his for the taking. And it would destroy our chances of defeating his Senate.

That's why I'm personally coming to you again to ask for your help.

body:
[1]Beto for America

Hi! It’s Rob again. On
Thursday, I told you Beto has a SUPER important end-of-quarter fundraising
deadline and a $750k goal. I also noted we would meet that goal if 2
people in the 34223 zip code area donated. That’s based on the
number of Beto supporters near Englewood.

It sounds ridiculously easy. Just two people would put us over the line.
BUT, our ActBlue account says we still don’t have a single donation from
the 34223 zip since we asked. And frankly, I expected better
from the fine people of 34223. So I really need your help on
this one.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35729?refcode=ema20190928-57952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1043&akid=57952%2E444211%2EwhKj_Z ]Make a $3 donation
today — be one of the two we need in the 34223 zip code area.
If you do that, I know we can hit our goal.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35729?refcode=ema20190928-57952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1062&akid=57952%2E444211%2EwhKj_Z ]Contribute $3

I wouldn’t be emailing you so much if this deadline weren’t super
important. But I know exactly what’s going to happen if we don’t meet this
goal... and it’s not good. Our numbers will be made public in the FEC’s
official report. People are going to gauge them as a sign of the strength
of Beto’s campaign.

So you know what we need to do. We need to hit this goal and post some
big, impressive numbers. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35729?refcode=ema20190928-57952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1063&akid=57952%2E444211%2EwhKj_Z ]That being said, can I count on you to be one
of the two people we need in the 34223 area to donate now
before the deadline?

Thank you again for all you’ve already given to this campaign. We couldn’t
do any of this without you.

Rob Flaherty
Digital Director
Beto for America

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190928footer&t=1064&refcode2=57952_444211_whKj_Z&akid=57952%2E444211%2EwhKj_Z

name: Bevin Alert
subject: in shambles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We've prepared all along for this to be a hard-fought race. But Matt Bevin's campaign appears to be falling apart in the homestretch.
|
---

| | Peter,

**It 's been a no-good, very-bad past few months for Matt Bevin.** His campaign appears to be falling apart in the homestretch.

According to _Politico_ : **" Kentucky governor makes last-minute campaign shakeup" in a _" potentially ominous sign"_** and calls in a D.C. political operative to salvage his flailing reelection.

It's no wonder why Bevin's campaign is such a mess. In recent weeks Matt Bevin has gone after his own lieutenant governor and doubled down on his attacks on teachers. He's still refusing to explain his use of the state plane -- _even saying it 's none of our business what he does with the taxpayer-funded jet._ | But Peter, none of this is going to matter if Matt Bevin and his big-money allies are able to swamp us in spending at the end.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: #MoscowMitch closes the FEC right before the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The number of Federal Election Commission (FEC) commissioners dropped to 3 at the end of August, bringing the nation's election regulatory body below the stipulated quorum of 4. They now cannot hold meetings, issue fines, or clarify rules that keep our elections as fair as possible \-- opening the door for campaigns to ignore finance regulations and accept endless amounts of money without fear of repercussions. Foreign governments will have an easier time interfering in the 2020 presidential elections and GOP dark money will flow freely. This is no accident \-- it's part of a carefully orchestrated assault on democracy by national Republicans, specifically #MoscowMitch McConnell. He's the one who has stood in the way of campaign finance reform, spearheaded the Citizens United case, and blocked any new appointments to the FEC. He is actively tearing down every protection that props up our democracy and even standing in the way of election protections that would stop Russia from meddling in 2020. If you believe that our country needs a fully functioning FEC and Democrats need to fight back against corrupt politicians like Mitch McConnell, we need your donation NOW. [**If every person reading this email gave just $1, we could give Republicans a run for their corporate PAC money in 2020. Can you help us save the FEC and repair the damage Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP have done to our democracy by donating $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd28/6e9863e8/150544ba/1db0d222/500545626/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190923a.ND&refcode2=anxmm2h6OK79yn0fWJi6") Thank you for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd28/6e9863e8/150544ba/1db0d220/500545626/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190923a.ND&refcode2=anxmm2h6OK79yn0fWJi6")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I was told this would be a costly decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
This campaign is based on the core principle that everyone is treated equally, regardless of how much they can afford to give. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a15/45c30650/10a641009/668ca705/14845274/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm going to ask if you can make your first donation to this campaign to help catch up to our fundraising goal before Monday's FEC deadline. But first, I want to tell you why your support is so powerfully important.

When I decided that I wanted to do fundraising the right way -- without spending my time calling up wealthy donors or hosting fancy, closed-door events where guests can only get in if they write a ginormous check -- I was told it would be a costly decision.

It certainly meant that we would be outraised by other candidates. But it's given me hundreds of hours of time back to spend at town halls and in selfie lines with more voters, grassroots donors, and volunteers. And that time is more valuable to me than any big check.

I'll just be blunt, though: This decision also means we're counting on grassroots donors like you to help hit every goal.

**[I'm fighting to get big money out of Washington and put power into the hands of working people, but I can't do it alone-- it's only possible with contributions from people like you. Will you make your first donation right now to help make sure we hit this goal before Monday at midnight?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a15/45c30650/10a641009/668ca704/14845274/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMU1GX0VPUV9ORkZfRV8yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1MF_EOQ_NFF_E_20190928_V1S3_P_T2")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: $3](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a15/45c30650/10a641009/668ca706/14845274/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMU1GX0VPUV9ORkZfRV8yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=EMJ1MF_EOQ_NFF_E_20190928_V1S3_P_T2")
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a15/45c30650/10a641009/668ca704/14845274/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMU1GX0VPUV9ORkZfRV8yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1MF_EOQ_NFF_E_20190928_V1S3_P_T2")
---
>
This campaign is based on the core principle that everyone is treated equally, regardless of how much they can afford to give.

That means when we're approaching a critical fundraising deadline, you won't see me hosting swanky fundraisers in the Hamptons or Los Angeles. Instead, we send emails like this one to help hit our fundraising goals.

And when this team pitches in what they can to hit each and every fundraising goal, we send a powerful message -- that it _is_ possible to run campaigns without catering to the wealthy and well-connected.

**[If we want to make big, structural change, we need to continue to grow our grassroots movement, and that means we need to hit this goal before the FEC deadline on September 30. If you can, please chip in $3 or whatever you can.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a15/45c30650/10a641009/668ca704/14845274/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMU1GX0VPUV9ORkZfRV8yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1MF_EOQ_NFF_E_20190928_V1S3_P_T2")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529a15/45c30650/10a641009/668ca704/14845274/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMU1GX0VPUV9ORkZfRV8yMDE5MDkyOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1MF_EOQ_NFF_E_20190928_V1S3_P_T2")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"Democrats want to impeach President Trump and they do not care if the facts support their cause." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57d06dacdb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**After Failing on Russia, Democrats Try a New Hoax**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef8a7b6317&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“Sequels are rarely better than the original. If we have learned anything over the last six days, as the feeding frenzy over the whistleblower has overtaken official Washington, it is this: Democrats want to impeach President Trump and they do not care if the facts support their cause,” Matt Mackowiak writes. “After more than two years of Democrats’ hyperventilating, Mr. Trump was cleared of collusion and conspiracy. Democrats and their media allies overhyped their claims and won Pulitzer Prizes along the way. But they failed in their objective.”
---
|
---
| [**Complaint From So-Called ‘Whistleblower’ Is Riddled With Gossip, Blatant Falsehoods**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a147d742e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Federalist_
The formal complaint from an anti-Trump “whistleblower” has followed “the same template used in the infamous and debunked Clinton campaign-funded Steele dossier,” Sean Davis writes. “Rather than provide direct evidence that was witnessed or obtained firsthand by the complainant, the document instead combines gossip from various anonymous individuals, public media reports, and blatant misstatements of fact and law in service of a narrative that is directly contradicted by underlying facts. A footnote in the document even boasts about its use of ‘ample open-source information.’”
---
|
---
| [**Adam Schiff and Democrats are Twisting Words to Smear Trump**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=64aeba95c0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“We were promised a Hollywood-style, smoking gun quid pro quo. But after the transcript was released, the whistleblower complaint came out, and the House Intelligence Committee grilled acting Director of National Intelligence Joseph Maguire, leaving most people with glazed-over expressions, wondering what the big deal is,” Jenna Ellis Rives writes. In the hearing, Chairman Adam Schiff attempted to play word games with Maguire in an effort to manipulate the situation. “So why the manipulation? Because the Democrats know their case is weak. Their only hope lies in trying to twist legal terminology for their political advantage.”

**More dishonesty:** [“Adam Schiff performs fake conversation between Trump and Ukraine President”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a6757094e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**At the UN, Trump Rightly Stands Up for National Sovereignty**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ed4f8438c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
President Trump “is never afraid to stand up for popular self-government and the greatest guarantor self-government has ever had: the nation-state,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes. “Trump did very well in his Tuesday speech to the U.N. General Assembly to reassert, once again, that the nation-state is a good thing; speaking as he was in an institution with misguided supranational ambitions. This was something U.N. bureaucrats and diplomats needed to hear from the leader of the free world.”

**President Trump:**[“The future does not belong to globalists.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6182963e5a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**American Farmers Main Winners From U.S.-Japan Trade Agreement**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c69b77d540&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Bloomberg_
It’s U.S. farmers that “are set to be the main winners from President Donald Trump’s initial accord with Japan,” Mario Parker reports. “Under a trade agreement announced by Trump and Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe on Wednesday, the Asian country will lower or reduce tariffs on some $7.2 billion of American-grown farming products.”
---
|
---
| [**U.S. Will Remain in Postal Treaty After Emergency Talks**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f777e833e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The New York Times_
The Trump Administration “agreed on Wednesday to stay in a United Nations body that has regulated international mail service for more than a century after delegates agreed during emergency talks to change the way postal fees are structured,” Nick Cumming-Bruce reports. The deal “will allow the United States to start setting its own postal fees in July and allow other countries that receive more than 75,000 metric tons of mail a year to start phasing in higher rates in January 2021.” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro called the decision a “huge victory for millions of American workers and businesses,” saving the United States between $300 million and $500 million a year.
---
|

If we have learned anything over the last six days, as the feeding frenzy over the whistleblower has overtaken official Washington, it is this: Democrats want to impeach President Trump and they do not care if the facts support their cause,” Matt Mackowiak writes. “After more than two years of Democrats’ hyperventilating, Mr. Trump was cleared of collusion and conspiracy. Democrats and their media allies overhyped their claims and won Pulitzer Prizes along the way. But they failed in their objective.” | | -The Federalist The formal complaint from an anti-Trump “whistleblower” has followed “the same template used in the infamous and debunked Clinton campaign-funded Steele dossier,” Sean Davis writes. “Rather than provide direct evidence that was witnessed or obtained firsthand by the complainant, the document instead combines gossip from various anonymous individuals, public media reports, and blatant misstatements of fact and law in service of a narrative that is directly contradicted by underlying facts. A footnote in the document even boasts about its use of ‘ample open-source information.’” | | -Washington Examiner “We were promised a Hollywood-style, smoking gun quid pro quo. name: Deadline@maggiehassan.com
subject: defeating Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc391/2a380d31/3d9dde3b/f0d9d9/2592920610/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc391/2a380d31/3d9dde3b/f0d9d9/2592920610/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
The race to defeat Mitch McConnell is going to be really tough -- Roll Call says that his Democratic opponent, Marine Corps Veteran Amy McGrath, could face "long odds."
Replacing Mitch McConnell (the GOP's lead obstructionist and Donald Trump's top enabler) is doable, but that it'll also be _extremely_ expensive.
**We 're committed to doing everything we can to ditch Mitch, elect Amy, and win back the Senate, and we really need you to be part of that effort. [We need to raise $6,000 for Amy before Monday's big public fundraising deadline, and a donation of $3 or more -- today, right now -- would be immensely helpful. Team — right now the entire country is waiting to see how much money we raised on our next FEC report. _Monday is the deadline for us to bring in as many donations as possible before our fundraising numbers go public._
If we have a strong showing, the American people and our allies around the globe will see that thousands of American like you are ready to take our country in a new direction. **That’s why we’re setting an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 dollars between now and Monday.**
Don’t think of this as one of those cheesy fundraising asks to keep our office lights on or to keep coffee in the coffee pot at campaign headquarters. **Think of this as us asking you to raise your hand and show the millions of other Americans like you who are fed up with this president that you stand with them.**
[**So, first/friend, will you raise your hand?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCPACi4Wd1pihVmOZ1xiPoOg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190928_1s&n=3)
— Team Weld

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: this is tough to hear
body:
We have two choices.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5e/4bef7a87/6b60bbb4/287f3b53/434014703/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Good news:** Sara Gideon is almost surely going to receive considerably more small-dollar, grassroots contributions than Susan Collins during this official reporting period.
**Bad news:** Despite that fact, there's a good chance she will outraise us again. That's because Susan Collins is relying almost exclusively on very large donations from special interests, and our average donation is much much smaller than hers.
If we're going to close the gap, we have two choices: either we generate more donations, or the donations we receive have to be _slightly_ larger.
So, friend, if you could make your first online donation -- of even just $3 -- it will allow us to close the gap, report a great number, and win this race. What do you say?
[**Can you make a $3 donation before our FEC fundraising deadline on Monday? If we can close the gap, we can win this race and flip this Senate seat.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5e/4bef7a87/6b60bbb4/287f3b52/434014703/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190928-1-full")
Susan Collins can just reach out to her wealthy special interest friends when she needs help with fundraising -- but Sara can't do that. We're rejecting all corporate PAC money and running a campaign powered by your small-dollar donations.
That's just who we are. So if you keep fighting, we're going to win.
All our best,
Team Gideon
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5e/4bef7a87/6b60bbb4/287f3b52/434014703/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190928-1-full")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5e/4bef7a87/6b60bbb4/287f3b51/434014703/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5e/4bef7a87/6b60bbb4/287f3b50/434014703/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**
clean_body: We have two choices. "" Good news: Sara Gideon is almost surely going to receive considerably more small-dollar, grassroots contributions than Susan Collins during this official reporting period. Bad news: Despite that fact, there's a good chance she will outraise us again. That's because Susan Collins is relying almost exclusively on very large donations from special interests, and our average donation is much much smaller than hers. If we're going to close the gap, we have two choices: either we generate more donations, or the donations we receive have to be slightly larger. So, friend, if you could make your first online donation -- of even just $3 -- it will allow us to close the gap, report a great number, and win this race. What do you say? "" Susan Collins can just reach out to her wealthy special interest friends when she needs help with fundraising -- but Sara can't do that. We're rejecting all corporate PAC money and running a campaign powered by your small-dollar donations. That's just who we are. So if you keep fighting, we're going to win. All our best, Team Gideon "" Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Gardner has a big head start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Here's why this first FEC deadline is so important--this first report will set the tone for our entire campaign. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d4/691c9bd/6e2115f1/11a7a05f/3011537065/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

The very first FEC filing deadline for our campaign is just two days away, and we have a lot of ground to cover if we're going to meet our $125,000 goal.

[**_I 'm reaching out because I want your support documented on our first FEC report to prove what a force we are in this race--can you make your first donation right now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Here's why this first FEC deadline is so important--this first report will set the tone for our entire campaign.

Everyone with a stake in this race will be comparing our numbers to Cory Gardner's to gauge how strong we are out of the gate--and we all know he has a big head start.

With help from corporate PACs and Mitch McConnell's network of special interest allies like the NRA, Gardner has already squirreled away nearly $5 million dollars. That's a lot of money, and Gardner has cast a lot of votes in Washington that put special interests like the NRA ahead of Colorado families. He's been nothing more than a rubber stamp for their agenda.

It's one reason I'm not accepting a penny of corporate PAC money. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you.

This first FEC report is our chance to prove, beyond a shadow of a doubt, that we can compete fearlessly with Gardner's special interests and corporate PACs.

Let's send a message: Colorado can't be bought--our future belongs to us.

[**_Please consider chipping in whatever you can to help us reach our $125,000 goal before Monday 's deadline._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_all_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_all_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_all_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_all_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190928_JH_20190928-fr-JH-goal-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We have to qualify for the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Qualifying for these debates is critical to our path to victory. We need every ounce of time in front of a national audience of Democrats if we’re going to win and take on the establishment candidates with higher name recognition.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=801%2E377263%2EYqspaB) Team --

The DNC announced that we must reach 3% in four qualifying polls or 5% in two early state polls between now and a week before the November debate.

Qualifying for these debates is critical to our path to victory. We need every ounce of time in front of a national audience of Democrats if we’re going to win and take on the establishment candidates with higher name recognition.

**My team has built a plan that will ensure we qualify for the debates -- but we must raise $1,500,000 by midnight on September 30th (our FEC deadline) to fully execute it.**

[ **Can you rush $5 right now towards our goal so we can qualify for these debates? If you want my voice on that stage, then I need you to donate now. ** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11306?t=5&akid=801%2E377263%2EYqspaB) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11306?t=8&akid=801%2E377263%2EYqspaB)
---
Our progress to goal is live on our website. That means other campaigns, the media, and everyone watching will see whether we hit this big goal or fall short.

I’m counting on you, Yang Gang. Let’s show the country what this movement is made of. [**Pitch in what you can now.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11306?t=7&akid=801%2E377263%2EYqspaB)

-Andrew

Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.
[DONATE NOW](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11306?t=6&akid=801%2E377263%2EYqspaB)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=801%2E377263%2EYqspaB) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=801%2E377263%2EYqspaB) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: The Way Ahead Action Team
subject: Monday's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
We have an opportunity to flip the Virginia General Assembly for the first time in two decades.
| | | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21dd/39260142/426160a4/62639ac4/3843807060/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")
---
Friends-- Every dollar The Way Ahead raises between now and Monday night's end of quarter fundraising deadline will go toward flipping both chambers of the General Assembly for the first time in two decades. We have accomplished a lot over the last two years. But the most important work is ahead of us. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Susan Collins needs to be held accountable for her Kavanaugh vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Susan Collins was the deciding vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court, cutting short the already incomplete and limited investigation into his past \-- all this despite numerous allegations of sexual assault and misconduct against him. Senator Collins thought the anti-choice judge's "judicial temperament" and his potential to "lessen the divisions" in our government would be good for the Supreme Court, but instead, she voted for someone who lied to the Senate and then asked _New York Times_ reporters to lie for him. Now, all this is coming back to bite her \-- Maine voters are well aware that she betrayed her supposed pro-choice and pro-survivors values, and, in turn, betrayed Maine and America. Her net approval rating in Maine has dropped by 43 points in the past three years, showing how close she is to being voted out. Democrats have NO CHANCE of taking back the Senate unless we win in Maine. Speaker of the Maine House Sara Gideon is running to flip the seat blue, and if we're going to help her hold Susan Collins accountable for her callous vote to silence sexual assault survivors, we need to hear from 130 more engaged Democrats by MIDNIGHT: **Do you approve of Susan Collins?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2a/6e9863e8/1506d1f7/1db0d22b/2881134087/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/q08kAHj1") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2a/6e9863e8/1506d1f7/1db0d22b/2881134087/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/q08kAHj1") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2a/6e9863e8/1506d1f7/1db0d229/2881134087/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=WDTO20190928b.ND-b&refcode2=vTXQIwwNxftvLTyAvch3")

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I'll tell you why every top Democrat is emailing you:

\-- Nancy Pelosi
\-- Adam Schiff
\-- Ben Ray Lujan
\-- James Carville
\-- Khizr Khan
\-- Deb Haaland
\-- Ted Lieu
\-- Pramila Jayapal
\-- Jacky Rosen
\-- Gabby Giffords

That's because this is the biggest deadline Ben Ray has ever faced in his Senate race.

If we fall short, we could squander our once-in-a-lifetime shot to defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate!

[**_Can I count on you to help Ben Ray out with $5 before his massive end-of-quarter deadline in 48 hours? He needs 1,437 Democrats to step up before the deadline >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b2_begala_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Everybody under the sun has been asking me:

Can we really defeat Mitch McConnell for the first time in 30 years?

I'll tell you what I always say:

I KNOW this is our best shot in decades to oust McConnell -- AND defeat his entire Republican Senate.

**But our chances take a huge hit if we lose Ben Ray's critical Senate race in New Mexico.**

Can I count on your $5 before Ben Ray's critical deadline in 48 hours? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b2_begala_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Paul

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. Person by person, community by community, we're building a grassroots movement that will fight for big, structural change. That's how we're going to win the White House, make big, structural change, and rewrite the rules of Washington to work for all Americans.

Team Warren

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: There's a very good reason I'm sending you this email right now
body:
We need to get back on track.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c60/4bef7a87/6b6181be/287f38f9/1635734347/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend - I'm emailing you for $5. I promise, there's a very good reason.
We have a really important FEC fundraising deadline on Monday, and to be honest, we're not where we'd hoped to be at this point in the quarter.
That's why I'm reaching out now, to try and get us back on track before Monday.
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before Monday at midnight to help us close the fundraising gap? Susan Collins outraised us last quarter, and we can 't let that happen again. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c60/4bef7a87/6b6181be/287f38f8/1635734347/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190928-2-b")
Ours truly is a people-powered campaign. We aren't taking any money from corporate PACs, so small-dollar donations from supporters like you are the backbone of our campaign. We're proud of that fact, but it means emails like this one are really important, _especially_ right now.
**So can Sara and I count on your help? Make a donation before our FEC deadline on Monday - you can use this link:**
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/EndOfQuarterDeadline](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c60/4bef7a87/6b6181be/287f38f8/1635734347/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190928-2-b")**
Thanks for being a part of the grassroots team that's going to flip this seat. I mean it when I say we can't do this without you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c60/4bef7a87/6b6181be/287f38f8/1635734347/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190928-2-b")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c60/4bef7a87/6b6181be/287f38ff/1635734347/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c60/4bef7a87/6b6181be/287f38fe/1635734347/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Monday, September 30th marks the end of the third quarter and it is vital that we have a solid show of support from our grassroots. Any amount you can contribute makes a huge difference.

Show your support with a [$100, $75, $50, or even $25 donation by clicking here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ad7a07072e&e=1050d051da). Jake LaTurner

name: Dave Lindstrom
subject: FW: Did You Take My Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindstrom for Senate
body:
A while back I sent out a very important email. In case you missed it, I am forwarding my Priorities Survey for you to take. I need to know what you v
Peter,
A while back I sent out a very important email. In case you missed it, I am forwarding my Priorities Survey for you to take. I need to know what you value the most, whether that be lower taxes, pro-life policies, or secured borders.
Kansans deserve a Senator who will represent their views in Congress. I want to be your direct representative in Washington D.C. Will you take my Priorities Survey now?
****[PRIORITIES SURVEY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=f2f0bd44bd434ee9bfaf22004c5efb20&_e=lfoHUFdLa7wDKIJU04Xj-zNn7DuMPLdm2WfNTyWl2vIiTcbaZ6Q1InCUt-zFL00JAGhwTuZmGXgZJaoMOpCPI3g0bOrlUpEU0mB_pG1rka4Wg0Nvh01lxLT9u2XAlDxVmL05WqFPElrjlANmSLjsxpxo7yDJpx3rk_OYA026XpRmYi3-DLiqufAOVqtDkdH6o2feSU-gw0DTJoLkZNBv2EuxfTDke9LcfI95EAmPHivFbcniCAXQmU2FVp16_SM88MXIrNZSvz4XpNCMrfLBM2ExN6ydqGbHrOTsGP0Q8J-ry-9--rKsTKetoWqPRw1rqlIAq5jTWqpkZNFtPWE2k2kvUVvGeMkp2hav6PpZqUs2ntJsQcZiPgy56maNVuxE_i873qjbqp79ySrudvF6H-VLfEmajnsROqlT0Om3j-fRRgqWqAOMFvRM4Pqu8ydn)****
---
My opponents aren’t concerned with truly representing Kansans. They are just focused on supporting their own beliefs and their own narrative. I am running for the Senate to tell Washington **YOUR BELIEFS** , Peter.
To do that, I need you to fill out my Priorities Survey immediately. Will you help me represent you?
****[PRIORITIES SURVEY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=f2f0bd44bd434ee9bfaf22004c5efb20&_e=lfoHUFdLa7wDKIJU04Xj-zNn7DuMPLdm2WfNTyWl2vIiTcbaZ6Q1InCUt-zFL00JAGhwTuZmGXgZJaoMOpCPI3g0bOrlUpEU0mB_pG1rka4Wg0Nvh01lxLT9u2XAlDxVmL05WqFPElrjlANmSLjsxpxo7yDJpx3rk_OYA026XpRmYi3-DLiqufAOVqtDkdH6o2feSU-gw0DTJoLkZNBv2KOORB_qm3HcnajRnd_ak-mjn6DuAaYL1eFY4fTThfdbgVkzKPh1bXah4r1fUGx-HMET5_72cWVnBnYyx1UiHti4kXgJJA9U3Rttn0Zfcwf6eM-LT4oZ8DT9NjY7NCSXV0Ll23uixr5CZUMnKBhDoR528yBJ2Kc5RbUqqJgNuqr6ZzZtMSP3wuqoZpkIc6s2x-nZb1pf8nG40svrSg8_J7uS9Wmt8p4dGWtpR-wxuAV4)****
---

Together, we can take on the Washington elites and their dirty lobbyist money.
Together, we can protect President Trump from impeachment.
Together, we can secure our southern border to protect Kansans.
Together, we can SACK THE LEFT
Thank you for your support, Peter.
-Dave Lindstrom

**\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

Peter,
I've been emailing you a lot lately to ask for your support.
But now I'm asking for it in a different way.

I need your help to shape my strategy - your feedback on what's most important to Kansas families.
[**That's why I've selected you to take my OFFICIAL 2019 ISSUES SURVEY**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=f2f0bd44bd434ee9bfaf22004c5efb20&_e=lfoHUFdLa7wDKIJU04Xj-zNn7DuMPLdm2WfNTyWl2vIiTcbaZ6Q1InCUt-zFL00JAGhwTuZmGXgZJaoMOpCPI3g0bOrlUpEU0mB_pG1rka4Wg0Nvh01lxLT9u2XAlDxVmL05WqFPElrjlANmSLjsxkCeqwx_66tNsvdbnsLsvhpcrBczrBzUXOi_4zm6Y6YUxpnragyNSkzK0DquWVUWj_3CMDGV9Gwtp-EgIbj8XUGOx1goaMIqKTTOfG2PkC1Eh52SeKKe1pUhFgmMvxDmGrQGIJS3VgZOUdC10bILFAKg8Wy5uKqiiPWpIZ3tpQdCeeqppv8jJ13NcbR2hVMmv9E2wDpHzC5TgJySXFzstZJ1FVMtYEb7KEbopFi_IZI-ej4xsnh7ynRTbDPuoVh0ZQ%3D%3D), which my team and I will use to plan our tactics for this election.
****[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=f2f0bd44bd434ee9bfaf22004c5efb20&_e=lfoHUFdLa7wDKIJU04Xj-zNn7DuMPLdm2WfNTyWl2vIiTcbaZ6Q1InCUt-zFL00JAGhwTuZmGXgZJaoMOpCPI3g0bOrlUpEU0mB_pG1rka4Wg0Nvh01lxLT9u2XAlDxVmL05WqFPElrjlANmSLjsxkCeqwx_66tNsvdbnsLsvhqNa4EQltUeKZF5p_ZCxYY3E1da1JDewQOQYfoAR4RmPWEDQpfPBy0BjLn0f7hqwwqs54FhDldXaKk7q_GWVLYIywWYsHLsjNrWvx6tPi6sLE3tOFJhrRDI2NNdjpbOFUoUJdzVVMcz6LoPG8Ihh4VhMIz0i2O1PQbWPybPy3WAfxlTeHBEVLnhoX7FyucP1DBP9pbBtORdtr8-8xAHcUaghSpjJSSKGNrRcDq2wKZftg%3D%3D)****
---
You see Peter, I've been traveling around Kansas for months, speaking with residents in every corner of our state, from every walk of life.
Each of them has a story. Issues they care about. Values they want to protect.
That's why I need to hear from you, to ensure that I get advice on the issues to focus on from all around Kansas.**[Don't let your area be underrepresented!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=f2f0bd44bd434ee9bfaf22004c5efb20&_e=lfoHUFdLa7wDKIJU04Xj-zNn7DuMPLdm2WfNTyWl2vIiTcbaZ6Q1InCUt-zFL00JAGhwTuZmGXgZJaoMOpCPI3g0bOrlUpEU0mB_pG1rka4Wg0Nvh01lxLT9u2XAlDxVmL05WqFPElrjlANmSLjsxkCeqwx_66tNsvdbnsLsvhpnQ-IqmFQRi3W1XqGeBj2By7MSxIVi_t86T2xUftzMqoTMRxoLJVHcnjYRVZO5vDXnStG14Wyvc1CxbxJHJPMeXfPeDJklYh2S_gVjlhOZNE7Pg5vHLGFOcLAzmE5bHcFUl6PSwaGPuu3Avk1MXe9IfYE3r4Q96-XsFwFLeUxkuh2B1W8guFkLsNoiysm7TaBv7TAZHbdKMkgKea1Z1j3D3f5QOD5pNDVBWbSgDeQLPw%3D%3D)**[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=f2f0bd44bd434ee9bfaf22004c5efb20&_e=lfoHUFdLa7wDKIJU04Xj-zNn7DuMPLdm2WfNTyWl2vIiTcbaZ6Q1InCUt-zFL00JAGhwTuZmGXgZJaoMOpCPI3g0bOrlUpEU0mB_pG1rka4Wg0Nvh01lxLT9u2XAlDxVmL05WqFPElrjlANmSLjsxkCeqwx_66tNsvdbnsLsvhps43y_yBTTUwWoUYC51l2m3YgjEEArbLfoj3c4XaOpxglAZhy6x-b-aOmCICdPDI1wRmIQIdJiY398xkEalWBMC78EOriutgtN8RR9ihkLfArUuoDBzKZAL1_IykzfluydL0MVzbBlq47qIZ6MPq3Yq8iuo6kmLHm8G9bcvLyOR0I1OYA3hQJjsi_eyy_NwUlhwbL4cEI11jDHuxBLcsaJRXogViFcmjYm4wznlUUoAg%3D%3D)
Peter, I’ve heard the stories of the working family struggling to get by, who would be hurt by socialistic, liberal policies like Medicare for All. I’ve met the kids who want to see improved schools and brighter futures. I’ve seen the great talent we cultivate here in Kansas pack their bags and move away.
If we’re going to fight for our state – and our country – we’re going to have to do it together.
That’s why it’s so important that you do your part to make sure my strategy to keep Kansas conservative is sound.
[**Will you take my Issues Survey now?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=f2f0bd44bd434ee9bfaf22004c5efb20&_e=lfoHUFdLa7wDKIJU04Xj-zNn7DuMPLdm2WfNTyWl2vIiTcbaZ6Q1InCUt-zFL00JAGhwTuZmGXgZJaoMOpCPI3g0bOrlUpEU0mB_pG1rka4Wg0Nvh01lxLT9u2XAlDxVmL05WqFPElrjlANmSLjsxkCeqwx_66tNsvdbnsLsvhoeTWdsR-0WZfNrWAeHvhQS3PDouRoJVNOvFFLCS6-awC5EUhoeTejZ-UvWncFdtDwZxI2ytkoy5IF4mHsC29xP3ANu3jd8eN7S8A1DhBZUfyj7fvsxjkDuQnllWz5QyUuLFG-MRueZX7JsVzmrwhYhPfeBHeewbGsOghkA90UzXokKBD4YeKFYRWDhZR6gDEE1Yf2_fWdCXsyQTY1_IEDH2Dmw7F8MHWVL36qGuOy-4Q%3D%3D)
Dave Lindstrom
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Kansas
