name: Jon Bon Jovi
subject: A note about my friend, Cory Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| | **_Please read this note from my friend Jon Bon Jovi, then consider[chipping in to help us hit our $1.7 million fundraising goal before Monday.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190928_JBJ_20190928-fr-JBJ-bonjovi-actives_actives_header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") \- Cory_**
Friend, As a lifelong New Jerseyan myself, I've seen the great things Cory has done for our state, whether it's fighting to protect our coasts from offshore drilling, reinvigorating our local economy, or enacting historic criminal justice reform --to name just a few of his many accomplishments. What I think is even more important, though, is that he's someone who has spent his entire career bringing people together to take on our biggest challenges. This is a serious moment in our nation's history. We're deeply divided in a way we haven't been in a long time. I believe we need to respond with a strong call for unity and a renewed sense of shared purpose. I can't think of anyone better than Cory Booker to rise to the challenge. **He is the right leader for this moment.** **[Cory needs all of us to step up right now so we can hit his $1.7 million end-of-quarter goal. Are you able to send in a donation today?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190928_JBJ_20190928-fr-JBJ-bonjovi-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** To put it simply, I think Cory Booker is a great man who would do an amazing job in the White House. I'm lucky to call him a friend, and all of us would be lucky to call him our president. I hope you'll join me in supporting him. Sincerely,

Jon Bon Jovi [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190928_JBJ_20190928-fr-JBJ-bonjovi-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b92/5fca0d19/778f5905/291f0ddb/756259888/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b92/5fca0d19/778f5905/291f0dda/756259888/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b92/5fca0d19/778f5905/291f0dd9/756259888/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b92/5fca0d19/778f5905/291f0dd8/756259888/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b92/5fca0d19/778f5905/291f0c27/756259888/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b92/5fca0d19/778f5905/291f0ddb/756259888/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

subject: Two days and 93%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| **URGENT REQUEST: Two days left until the FEC deadline.**

**This is our first FEC deadline since Congressman Joe Kennedy III announced his challenge against Ed Markey.**

_**[Rush $27 or more to stand with Ed before the FEC deadline!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092819_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Team: Ed Markey is on the front lines of the fights that matter to the people of Massachusetts, and he's ready to win.

Our first FEC deadline since Congressman Joe Kennedy III launched his primary campaign against Ed is in two days, and our public FEC fundraising report must show that Ed's people-powered campaign is stronger than ever.

**[Please: Pitch in $27 now and show you stand with Ed](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092819_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Support for Ed is broad, diverse, deep, and growing!

✅Elizabeth Warren is standing with Ed.
✅Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez endorsed Ed because he is a champion for our progressive values.
✅AFSCME Council 93, which represents 30,000 local and state government employees is all in for Ed.
✅Progressive organizations like NARAL, LCV Action Fund, Coalition for Social Justice, the Sierra Club, the Sunrise Movement, 350 Mass Action, and more are standing with Ed.
✅And 73% of the Massachusetts state legislature is with Ed.

We need to show everyone that our movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality -- is unstoppable.

_**[We're 93% of the way to our FEC deadline goal with only two days left. Your donation will be a huge show of support for Ed if you make it today.](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092819_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _

_**[Donate $10 now](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM-092819_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez endorsed Ed because he is a champion for our progressive values. ✅AFSCME Council 93, which represents 30,000 local and state government employees is all in for Ed. ✅Progressive organizations like NARAL, LCV Action Fund, Coalition for Social Justice, the Sierra Club, the Sunrise Movement, 350 Mass Action, and more are standing with Ed. ✅And 73% of the Massachusetts state legislature is with Ed. We need to show everyone that our movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality -- is unstoppable. "=" If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Team Yang
subject: The final countdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
It’s up to each and every one of us to ensure that we continue to surge in the polls, gain a wider American audience, and achieve our fundraising goals.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS) **MONDAY NIGHT DEADLINE: $507,291 to go!** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=5&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---
Hey Yang Gang --

With the FEC deadline almost here, the final countdown begins now.

[ **With less than 72 hours to go, we’ve got to give it everything we’ve got to reach our goal of $1.5 million! (Plus, isn’t it fun to watch Andrew get closer and closer to the mark?!)** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=14&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
[](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=13&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
As one of Andrew’s dedicated supporters, you know that these last few days until the FEC filing deadline are critical. On Tuesday, everyone will see just how much we’ve raised. And October is one of the most important months in a presidential campaign to invest in early state organizing.

[ **It’s more important than ever to give at this moment, so if you can, please pitch in $5 or more now.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=12&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=16&amount=25&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---

We’re at a crossroads in America.

We must stand up and put a candidate in the Oval Office that will put Humanity First. Meeting our fundraising goal this quarter will send the message that Andrew is the candidate that the country wants and needs. [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=15&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---

Let's do this,
Team Yang **Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11707?t=6&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=891%2E377263%2E5ff-KS) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

I'm so proud of the campaign we're building. We're not taking a thing for granted -- we've seen what Republicans are already doing in Minnesota to try and flip the state. It's why Donald Trump just announced he's coming to Minnesota on October 10th.

We know Republicans are going to campaign here like never before.

We are going to make sure every Minnesotan knows they matter, that Tina hears them, and that she'll have their backs. Unlike Jason Lewis whose track record in Congress shows he won't stand up for Minnesotans.

**But to make sure we can reach every voter, it's going to take serious resources. And right now, I need you to step up for the first time this quarter so we can meet our end-of-quarter deadline on Monday.**

**[Pitch in before midnight tonight, so we can stay on track for our end-of-quarter goal.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190928eoq3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for everything,

Ryan Furlong
Campaign Manager

name: Ted Lieu
subject: McConnell's doomed
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I only reach out when it's important, so hear me out: [**_Top Democrats and I are banding together to help Ben Ray meet his end-of-quarter goal. If we succeed, he 'll have the resources to WIN his Senate race and finally kick Mitch McConnell out of office. Can you kick in $5 before the deadline in 48 hours? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b3_lieu_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I stood by Ben Ray's side as he led the charge to do what so many thought impossible -- take back the House. So trust me: Now that he's running for Senate -- _**Mitch McConnell should be absolutely terrified.**_ Want proof? Since Ben Ray launched his race for Senate: \-- Mitch's approval rating completely plummeted \-- He's now in danger of losing the seat he's held for decades \-- And Democrats have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat McConnell and flip the ENTIRE Senate Republicans are flooding New Mexico with cash because they know if Ben Ray wins, they're completely doomed. I'm proud to stand by Ben Ray's side once again as he runs for New Mexico Senate, because I know he's our best shot to win the whole dang thing. His massive end-of-quarter deadline is in 48 hours, and I'm not leaving until he has every last penny he needs to pull this off. Will you chip in, help Ben Ray hit his goal, and join Democrats in making history? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b3_lieu_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b3_lieu_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b3_lieu_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b3_lieu_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190928_em_fr_b3_lieu_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

Thank you,

Ted Lieu

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b492/18e32a7f/5315eeee/7b0ef7aa/1499555530/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b492/18e32a7f/5315eeee/7b0ef7ab/1499555530/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b492/18e32a7f/5315eeee/7b0ef7a8/1499555530/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b492/18e32a7f/5315eeee/7b0ef7a9/1499555530/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b492/18e32a7f/5315eeee/7b0ef7ae/1499555530/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b492/18e32a7f/5315eeee/7b0ef7af/1499555530/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Miss Whiskers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Campaigns are really upping the ante when it comes to fundraising for the
FEC deadline. Two candidates said this week they would drop out if they
don’t meet their goals. Now, we’re not going to do that. But, I am
starting to run out of ways to show how important this deadline is.

Maybe I could do a Facebook live stream with a kitten in hand and say,
“You know, we wouldn’t want anything to happen to this kitten now would
we... Send your $5 now and Miss Whiskers will be fine.”

To be clear, we’re not planning on harming any kittens. But we do need
your help. We’re more than halfway to our goal, and if even 10% of the
people reading my email right now choose to donate, we could hit it within
just a few hours.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36046?refcode=ema20190928-58014&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=58014%2E444211%2EWso3PG ]Can you make a $3 (or another
amount) donation right now? Your contribution could be the
one that puts us over the line.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36046?refcode=ema20190928-58014&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=58014%2E444211%2EWso3PG ]Contribute $3

Whatever amount you can donate — $5, $15, or $50 — it all adds up,
allowing us to run a nationwide grassroots campaign without taking a
single dime from PACs, lobbyists, corporations or special interests... and
without threatening any kittens in the process! So please give today, or
sometime before Monday at midnight. This fundraising deadline is
absolutely critical.

Thank you,

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190928footer&t=1021&refcode2=58014_444211_Wso3PG&akid=58014%2E444211%2EWso3PG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=58014%2E444211%2EWso3PG

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

| **Joe Kennedy III is officially going after Ed Markey 's Senate seat **

Progressive champions are standing with Ed in the fights that matter most to Massachusetts and our country.

_**[If you're standing with Ed, rush $27 or more before the September 30 FEC deadline and help Ed win!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092819_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Support for Ed is broad, diverse, deep, and growing. He's endorsed by:

➜ Elizabeth Warren
